era: 2010s-present. Seattle. Ambient / Drone. Experimental underground. E=2. New engine minimum. First ambient entry (Genre Stage 95). The quietest point in the engine.

location.formative: Seattle's ambient/drone underground. The Pacific Northwest tradition of contemplative, weather-influenced music. Gray skies, rain, maritime atmosphere.
location.career: Hollis Resnik -- ambient musician. 2010s-present. Seattle. Long-form compositions, layered synthesis, processed field recordings, harmonic drones.

associated_musicians.name: Loomer
associated_musicians.note: Loomer (118, E=4, shoegaze/noise) to Hollis Resnik (119, E=2, ambient). Energy drops by two levels. Heavy texture to near-silence.

associated_musicians.name: Deep Sea Diver
associated_musicians.note: Deep Sea Diver E=3 was the previous low. Hollis Resnik E=2 breaks the record. The descent continues.

associated_musicians.name: Kinski
associated_musicians.note: Kinski: hypnotic states through motorik loops (E=5). Hollis Resnik: meditation through ambient drones (E=2). Both alter consciousness.

associated_musicians.name: Chong Production
associated_musicians.note: Chong Production E=6, maximum force. Hollis Resnik E=2, near-silence. The engine's full dynamic range in 12 degrees.

associated_musicians.name: Nirvana
associated_musicians.note: Grunge (E=5) to ambient (E=2). Seattle's full genre spectrum: loudest cultural export to quietest.

theory_nodes.concept: The near-silence (one hundred twentieth acoustic element -- music approaching the threshold of perception; amplitude near threshold; harmonic stasis; temporal dissolution; textural depth beneath apparent simplicity; the engine's quietest point; E=2 new minimum)
examples: Hollis Resnik (degree 119) -- ambient. E=2. New engine minimum. Music at the threshold of perception.
Contrast with the guttural burst (degree 118, Loomer) -- heavy texture. The near-silence is the negation of distortion and force.
Contrast with the psychedelic engine-room (degree 107, Chong Production) -- E=6, maximum. The near-silence (E=2) is the direct inversion.
Contrast with the raw transmission (degree 116, Pony Time) -- stripped to energy essentials. Ambient is stripped to space essentials.
theory_nodes.description: The near-silence is the 120th acoustic element. Ambient music at the threshold of perception. E=2 new engine minimum.

ancestors: The guttural burst (degree 118) -- heavy texture descends to near-silence.
The energy descent trajectory: E=6,6,6,5,6,4,5,6,5,5,3,2 over degrees 107-119.
genealogy.relationship: One hundred twenty acoustic elements across one hundred nineteen degrees. Track element 121 at degree 120.

theory_nodes.concept: The energy descent (one hundred twentieth artist-city pattern -- E=6 corridor descends to E=2 new minimum over 12 degrees; range expansion; maximum to minimum; the engine's full dynamic range established)
examples: E=6 corridor (degrees 107-110, three consecutive maximums) followed by descent to E=2 (degree 119).
Trajectory: E=6,6,6,5,6,4,5,6,5,5,3,2. Twelve degrees from maximum to minimum.
Range expansion: E=2 to E=6 is now the engine's full dynamic range.
The descent is not decline -- it is range expansion at the bottom end.
theory_nodes.description: The energy descent is the 120th artist-city pattern. E=6 corridor descends to E=2 new minimum. Range expansion.

ancestors: E=6 corridor (107-110). The descent begins after the corridor closes.
genealogy.relationship: One hundred twenty artist-city patterns across one hundred nineteen degrees. Track pattern 121 at degree 120.

theory_nodes.concept: First Ambient -- Genre Stage 95 -- redefines what music means in the engine; not active projection but environmental modification; as ignorable as it is interesting; Brian Eno lineage; PNW contemplative tradition
examples: Hollis Resnik (degree 119) -- first ambient entry. Genre Stage 95.
Brian Eno's Ambient 1: Music for Airports (1978) -- the foundational text.
PNW ambient tradition: Grouper (Portland), Stars of the Lid influence, gray-sky contemplation.
Every prior genre assumed active projection. Ambient breaks the assumption.
theory_nodes.description: First ambient at degree 119. Genre Stage 95. Environmental modification rather than entertainment.

ancestors: No direct ancestor in the engine. Ambient is a new branch of the genre tree.
genealogy.relationship: First ambient at degree 119. Track whether ambient recurs.

theory_nodes.concept: New engine minimum -- E=2 at degree 119; the quietest point in 119 degrees; previous minimum E=3 at degree 117; near-silence as a legitimate energy level
examples: Hollis Resnik (degree 119) -- E=2. New engine minimum.
Previous minimum: Deep Sea Diver (degree 117) at E=3.
E=2: music exists, occupies space, does not assert itself. Present the way air is present.
Dynamic range: E=2 (ambient) to E=6 (noise). The engine's full expressive range.
theory_nodes.description: New engine minimum E=2 at degree 119. The quietest point. Near-silence as legitimate energy.

ancestors: E=3 at degree 117 (previous minimum). E=2 at degree 119 (new minimum).
genealogy.relationship: E=2 minimum at degree 119. Track whether E=1 appears.

cross_references.relationship: CONSECUTIVE DESCENT. Loomer (118, E=4, shoegaze/noise) to Hollis Resnik (119, E=2, ambient). Energy drops by two levels. Heavy texture to near-silence.
PREVIOUS MINIMUM. Deep Sea Diver: E=3. Hollis Resnik: E=2. New record low. The descent continues.
STASIS vs REPETITION. Kinski: hypnotic motorik loops (E=5). Hollis Resnik: ambient drones (E=2). Both alter consciousness, different mechanisms.
MAXIMUM vs MINIMUM. Chong Production: E=6, hip-hop, maximum force. Hollis Resnik: E=2, ambient, near-silence. Full dynamic range in 12 degrees.
GENRE DISTANCE. Grunge (E=5) to ambient (E=2). Seattle's full genre spectrum: loudest cultural export to quietest.
